summary: Tested Whale Activity Engine and Liquidity Ladder intelligence upgrade. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Liquidity Ladder section displays correctly, Whale Activity section conditionally renders when direction is BUY/SELL (currently NEUTRAL due to market conditions). All new fields present in API response.
passed_tests: whale_activity object present in trade signal response
whale_activity contains direction, strength, buy_pressure, sell_pressure, explanation fields
whale_activity.direction has valid values (BUY/SELL/NEUTRAL)
whale_activity.strength is in 0-100 range
whale_activity.buy_pressure and sell_pressure are numeric and non-negative
whale_activity.explanation is non-empty string
liquidity_ladder_summary object present in trade signal response
liquidity_ladder_summary contains more_attractive_side, sweep_expectation, nearest_above, nearest_below, path_analysis
liquidity_ladder_summary.more_attractive_side valid values (above/below/balanced)
liquidity_ladder_summary.sweep_expectation valid values (sweep_below_first/sweep_above_first/no_clear_sweep/balanced)
liquidity_ladder_summary.nearest_above/below have price and strength when present
liquidity_ladder_summary.path_analysis is non-empty string
whale_engine factor present in factors object with direction, strength, buy_pressure, sell_pressure, score, max
liquidity_ladder factor present in factors object with more_attractive_side, sweep_expectation, nearest_above, nearest_below, score, max
whale_confirms_direction boolean field present
sweep_first_expected boolean field present
All new v1.7 fields present (whale_activity, liquidity_ladder_summary, sweep_first_expected, whale_confirms_direction)
Factor scores within max ranges
Reasoning mentions Liquidity Ladder context when score != 0
REGRESSION: /api/market/bias works correctly
REGRESSION: /api/liquidity works correctly
REGRESSION: /api/support-resistance works correctly (returns object with levels array)
REGRESSION: /api/market/status works correctly
UI: Trade Signal Card displays with data-testid
UI: Liquidity Ladder section displays with ABOVE badge, nearest levels, path analysis
UI: Factor Breakdown shows whale_engine and liquidity_ladder factors
UI: Signal Reasoning mentions Liquidity Ladder path analysis
UI: Refresh button triggers signal update
critical_code_review_comments: Whale Activity section correctly conditionally renders only when direction is BUY or SELL (not NEUTRAL)
Current market shows NEUTRAL whale direction so section is hidden - this is expected behavior
Pattern Detection remains simplified/simulated as noted in mocked_api
context_for_next_testing_agent: Whale Activity Engine and Liquidity Ladder v1.7 features fully tested. Current signal shows NO TRADE with NEUTRAL whale direction (55% confidence). Liquidity Ladder shows 'above' as more attractive side with 8 levels above and 6 below. The whale_activity section in UI only appears when direction is BUY or SELL. All new API fields (whale_activity, liquidity_ladder_summary, sweep_first_expected, whale_confirms_direction, whale_engine factor, liquidity_ladder factor) are present and validated. Pattern Detection Engine remains MOCKED/simplified as noted by main agent.

whale_activity_engine.ui_display: Conditionally renders when direction is BUY or SELL (currently hidden due to NEUTRAL)

liquidity_ladder_summary.ui_display: Shows ABOVE badge, nearest levels with prices/strength, path analysis text
